title: carex lankana
intro: Carex lankana, also known as Sri Lanka sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex lankana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Carex lankana is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in topical creams and ointments to promote wound healing and skin health.
